title: BrownTown Revamped
description: A simple and optimized modpack that can be incorporated into a server or standalone world. Featuring mods such as Fishing Frontier, Particular, Subtle Effects, Iris Shaders, and many more!
body:
A simple and optimized modpack you can incorporate in a server or stand alone world. This pack focuses on performance without sacrificing visuals. The shaders provided range from fast to high demanding for low and high end computers.

Mods such as Dungeons and Taverns will generate many structures ranging from small to massive throughout your world, while keeping the structure spawn rate to a minumum to keep the vanilla feel.

Ther are also many QoL mods you'll find within. I don't wanna spoil too much, just find out for yourself!
